feedback_files.tests/test_feedback_idempotency.py:
from inventory.events import MemoryPublisher, reservation_created
from inventory.ledger import InventoryLedger, Reservation
from inventory.service import ReservationService


def test_retry_identity_is_scoped_to_tenant():
    ledger = InventoryLedger()
    ledger.set_stock("red", "sku", 5)
    ledger.set_stock("blue", "sku", 5)
    first = ledger.reserve("red", "same-token", "sku", 2)
    second = ledger.reserve("blue", "same-token", "sku", 2)

    assert first.tenant_id != second.tenant_id
    assert ledger.stock("blue", "sku") == 3


def test_service_replay_does_not_republish_creation():
    ledger = InventoryLedger()
    ledger.set_stock("solo", "sku", 9)
    publisher = MemoryPublisher()
    service = ReservationService(ledger, publisher)
    service.reserve("solo", "retry-me", "sku", 4, attempt=1)
    service.reserve("solo", "retry-me", "sku", 4, attempt=2)

    assert len(publisher.messages) == 1


def test_event_identity_is_stable_across_attempts_and_tenant_scoped():
    one = Reservation("tenant-1", "request-9", "sku", 1)
    two = Reservation("tenant-2", "request-9", "sku", 1)
    first_id = reservation_created(one, 1)["event_id"]
    retry_id = reservation_created(one, 8)["event_id"]
    other_tenant_id = reservation_created(two, 1)["event_id"]

    assert first_id == retry_id
    assert first_id != other_tenant_id
